name: ​WATERisLIFE Nano Bucket Filter
description: The ​WATERisLIFE ​Nano Bucket ​Filter ​ is a 0.1 micron hollow ​fiber membrane ​filtration ​system that supplies bacteriologically safe water.

taxonomy.sub_category: ​WATERisLIFE Nano Bucket Filter data coming soon Updated on January 2, 2024 · Created on October 2, 2019 ​WATERisLIFE Nano Bucket Filter Data Coming Soon The ​WATERisLIFE ​Nano Bucket ​Filter ​ is a 0.1 micron hollow ​fiber membrane ​filtration ​system that supplies bacteriologically safe water. Developed By Water is Life Tested By ​WATERisLIFE Nano Bucket Filter Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Data Coming Soon Product Description The WATERisLIFE Nano Bucket Filter is a hollow membrane filter, produced by the US‐based organization WATERisLIFE. It provides a family supply of bacteriologically safe water with a flow rate of approximately 1 liter per minute using nano tube technology with filtration to 0.1 micron. Target SDGs SDG 6: Clean Water and Sanitation SDG 1: No Poverty Market Suggested Retail Price $40.00 Target Users (Target Impact Group) Household Distributors / Implementing Organizations This product is distributed by WATERisLIFE which works globally to provide access to safe water. Thus far the organization has distribute filters in numerous countries including Brazil, Costa Rica, Chile, China, Democratic Republic of Congo, Ethiopia, Flint (Michigan, USA), Ghana, Haiti, India, Kenya, Mexico, Tanzania, and Thailand. Competitive Landscape Direct competitors include Grifaid Family Filter , VF 100 Village Bucket Filter , Aqusafe Filters , WateROAM ROAMfilter Lite , and Sawyer PointOne Filter .
